title: sedum jurgensenii subsp. jurgensenii
intro: Sedum jurgensenii subsp. jurgensenii, also known as Mexican Sedum or Burro's Tail, is a succulent plant species native to Mexico and parts of Central America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Sedum jurgensenii subsp. jurgensenii include soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and aiding in wound healing. Sedum jurgensenii subsp. jurgensenii can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and is also used in salves and creams for topical application.
